div.head: The Secretary of State to the Chargé in Honduras (Dennis)
div.p: 11. Your January 24, 8 p.m. You may participate in the inaugural ceremonies on February 1 in such manner as is customary in Honduras when a new constitutional government is to be inaugurated, and you may thereafter make the customary official calls on the officials of the new government. If you deem it advisable you may also address a note to the new Minister of Foreign Affairs expressing this Government’s gratification that it has now been possible to resume formal diplomatic relations with the Government of Honduras.
